SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthRads(index) AS exactEdgeLengthRads FROM hexagons WHERE index IN (1310277011704381439, 1310277011704381438);
SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthRads(index) AS exactEdgeLengthRads FROM hexagons;
WITH (SELECT 1310277011704381439) AS index_value SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthRads(index_value) AS exactEdgeLengthRads;
SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthRads((SELECT max(index) FROM hexagons)) AS exactEdgeLengthFromMax;
SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthRads((SELECT min(index) FROM hexagons)) AS exactEdgeLengthFromMin;
CREATE TABLE other_hexagons (index UInt64, description String);
SELECT oh.description, h3ExactEdgeLengthRads(oh.index) AS exactEdgeLengthRads FROM other_hexagons oh JOIN hexagons h ON oh.index = h.index;
WITH (SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthRads(1310277011704381439)) AS edge_length SELECT edge_length * 2 AS doubledEdgeLength;
